entities.name: strength_sessions
entities.context: SQLite database table storing workout session data including date, session_type, RPE, duration, soreness, exercises, and notes

entities.name: RPE
entities.context: Rate of Perceived Exertion, scored on a 1-10 scale, used to track workout intensity

entities.name: soreness_next_day
entities.context: Post-session soreness metric logged as a follow-up to strength training sessions

entities.name: log_soreness
entities.context: CLI function that updates a strength session record with next-day soreness level by session ID

entities.name: exercises_json
entities.context: JSON-encoded exercise data within a session, containing exercise name, sets, reps, and optional notes

relationships.context: RPE is a per-session intensity metric stored in each strength session record
Soreness is a delayed feedback field updated after a session via log_soreness
log_soreness updates the soreness_next_day column in the strength_sessions table
Each strength session contains a JSON blob of exercises performed with sets, reps, and notes
